name: Walnut Burgers
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Herb seasoned stuffing (pepper and garlic)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender, puree the tofu.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients to the pureed tofu, except for the stuffing.
3. Place the stuffing in a bowl and pour the tofu mixture over it.
4. Mix well until everything is combined.
5. Form into 8 burger patties and bake on a greased cookie sheet at 350°F (175°C) for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown. (Note: These can also be grilled.)
6. Serve on a burger bun with your favorite condiments.
NOTE: The patties can also be formed into 24 meatballs and served with spaghetti sauce over pasta.
